name: EBEmon

signature_move.name: Brain Rupture
signature_move.description: Launches a cracking program into the opponent's brain using the gun it carries in its left hand, extracting the data stored in its brain, or fires a purple beam that can take control of the target.

description: A Cyborg Digimon that was artificially created from a Vademon that was captured, and had its configuration data analyzed and improved. In a certain country's facility, called " Area 51 ", it seems they were using and building extraterrestrial technology, but the truth is shrouded in mystery. Its Special Move " Brain Rupture " is firing a cracking program into the opponent's brain with the gun it holds in its left hand, then absorbing all the data stored in their brain. Its " Planet Destroyer " is a technique that releases all of its accumulated power and fires it off from the gun in its right hand, so it is said that it's able to instantly destroy a single planet. It is said that that certain country is covertly conducting research and development on Digimon in order to take possession of the Digital World. EBEmon was adopted from a winning Digimon illustration entry in the " Digimon Web Dot-art Contest " which belonged to Mr. Yousuke from Gifu prefecture .
